'''Lapez 3''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] on which [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] [[Skirmish on Lapez 3|confronted]] the [[nightmare demon]] [[Reist]].
